creator: stephen@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm going to guess the build works in FreeBSD 10.1 because of Revision 271779 (see https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/stable/10/lib/msun/src/math.h?view=log), and so that suggests the broken should happen if OSVERSION is between 1000000 and 1000716 (see https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/versions.html).
